subject: Re: Saturday departure
body:
let you know tomorrow, ,,,cab dave and larry get in earlier form miami?

----- Original Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Cc: kellens@earthlink.net
Sent: Wednesday, November 22, 2006 3:48:59 AM
Subject: Saturday departure


 

Jeffrey,

I arrive at noon on Saturday, from Orlando.

Dave and Morrison arrive at 1:40pm from PBI.

If you would like a 3:30pm departure to LSJ, we could be on the ground in St. Thomas at 11:30pm.

Please advise departure time?

I figure 5 hours worse case. I will get a real time Friday night for winds.

lv
